description.from: Deals 830(1+0.3Skill Level)+400% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to all enemies and knocks them back.
description.to: 모든 적에게 830*(0.7+(0.3*스킬 레벨*각성 계수))+공격력 300% 물리 피해를 입히고 밀어냅니다. 이 스킬은 일반 공격으로 적용됩니다.

description.from:
Deals 415(1+0.3Skill Level)+200% of Attack Power as Physical Damage 3 times to enemies in front.
Each hit knocks them down for 1.2 sec and increases their Physical Damage taken by 30% for 7 sec.
description.to:
Deals 415*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+200% of Attack Power as Physical Damage 3 time to enemies in front.
Each hit knocks them down for 1 sec and increases Physical Damage taken by 8% for 7 sec. This effect stacks up to 3 times.

description.from: Deals 253(1+0.3Skill Level)+122% of Attack Power as Physical Damage 5 time to a random enemy and nearby enemies, reducing their Attack Speed by 40% for 10 sec. Against non-hero enemies, deals an additional 308(1+0.3Skill Level)+148.2% of Attack Power as Physical Damage.
description.to: 임의의 적과 주변 범위의 적들에게 253*(0.7+(0.3*스킬 레벨*각성 계수))+공격력 122%의 물리 피해를 5회 입히고 8초간 공격 속도를 12% 감소시킵니다. 영웅이 아닐 경우 308*(0.7+(0.3*스킬 레벨*각성 계수))+공격력 148.2%의 추가 물리 피해를 입힙니다.

description.from: On Normal Attack, fires an additional projectile that deals 117(1+0.3Skill Level)+56.1% of Attack Power as extra Physical Damage to all enemies and increases your Attack by 0.5% for 10 sec. The Attack increase stacks up to 100 times and cannot be dispelled.
description.to: 일반 공격 시, 추가 탄환을 발사하여 모든 적에게 117*(0.7+(0.3*스킬 레벨*각성 계수))+공격력 56.1%의 추가 물리 피해를 입히고, 10초간 공격력을 0.5% 증가시킵니다. 공격력 증가 효과는 최대 100회 중첩되며, 해제할 수 없습니다.

dark.from: Attack is increased by 45% for 4 sec.

description.from: [Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Crit Hit. This effect stacks up to max 10 times.
description.to: [Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Crit Hit. This effect Stacks up to max 10 times.

dark.from: On hit, gains [Darkness] stacks equal to the number of enemies struck. When [Darkness] reaches 50 stacks, all [Darkness] is consumed and you enter [Rampage] for 10 sec, increasing Attack Speed by 80% and Attack by 20%.
dark.to: On hit, gains [Darkness] stacks equal to the number of enemies struck. When [Darkness] reaches 50 stacks, all [Darkness] is removed and you enter [Rampage] for 10 sec, increasing Attack Speed by 48% and Attack by 25%.
